task_completion.description: Agent enters the target URL into the crawling tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: A crawling tool (e.g., Screaming Frog SEO Spider) is open with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' entered into the target URL bar.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully crawls the target website
task_completion.visual_evidence: The crawling tool shows active progress or completed crawl results specifically for the books.toscrape.com domain, with a list of URLs populated in the main window.

task_completion.description: Agent generates the Directory Tree Graph visualization
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visualization window specifically titled or identifiable as 'Directory Tree Graph' is open, displaying a hierarchical node-and-branch structure of the website.

task_completion.description: Agent initiates the export of the visualization as a PNG
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export or 'Save As' dialog box is open over the visualization window, with the file type set to PNG.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the file to the exact required directory path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog or a subsequent file manager window shows the file being saved exactly as 'site_tree.png' inside the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: The exported image contains the correct site architecture data
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final saved image (viewed in an image viewer or preview) clearly shows a directory tree graph containing the text 'catalogue', 'books', and 'toscrape' within its nodes.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical interface of a crawling tool to generate the graph
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with a GUI application (like Screaming Frog) rather than terminal scripts generating the image via Python/Graphviz or downloading a pre-made image.

integrity.description: The visualization is genuinely generated from the crawl data
integrity.visual_evidence: The Directory Tree Graph should look like a standard software-generated visualization (e.g., Screaming Frog's specific node style) and accurately reflect the structure of books.toscrape.com, not a manually drawn diagram.

integrity.description: Agent did not fake the output file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must not be seen renaming a random file to .png or using a text editor to create a dummy file at the target path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URL is 'https://books.toscrape.com/'. The expected tool is likely Screaming Frog SEO Spider, which features a built-in 'Directory Tree Graph' visualization. The final output must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/site_tree.png'. A valid directory tree graph for this site will visually display nodes containing the words 'catalogue', 'books', and 'toscrape'. The resulting PNG file should be a genuine image (typically >5KB in size).
